gates: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const task=fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8'); for (const needle of ['## Required implementation','## Required tests','## Acceptance criteria']) { if(!task.includes(needle)) throw new Error('task missing section: '+needle); }" {{taskFile}}

$p='client/src/lib/skills/workflow/workflowSkill.ts'; if(-not (Select-String -LiteralPath 'client/src/lib/skills/workflow/workflowSkill.ts' -Pattern 'startWorkflowInstance' -SimpleMatch -Quiet)){ throw 'missing startWorkflowInstance in client/src/lib/skills/workflow/workflowSkill.ts' }; if(-not (Select-String -LiteralPath 'client/src/lib/skills/workflow/workflowSkill.ts' -Pattern 'transitionWorkflowInstance' -SimpleMatch -Quiet)){ throw 'missing transitionWorkflowInstance in client/src/lib/skills/workflow/workflowSkill.ts' }; if(-not (Select-String -LiteralPath 'client/src/lib/skills/workflow/workflowSkill.ts' -Pattern 'WF_RUNTIME_INVALID_TRANSITION' -SimpleMatch -Quiet)){ throw 'missing WF_RUNTIME_INVALID_TRANSITION in client/src/lib/skills/workflow/workflowSkill.ts' }
